message:
Add CI verification gates and expand SSI e2e tests

CI workflow (.github/workflows/verification-gates.yml, +189 lines):
- Add multi-job verification pipeline with differential-correctness,
  durability-matrix, backlog-quality-gate, and SSI-serialization-
  correctness jobs running in parallel

Test harness:
- Add differential_manifest_runner binary for running differential
  test manifests in CI with structured JSON artifact output
- Expand differential_v2 harness with artifact-driven result capture
  for CI consumption
- Update backlog quality gate test thresholds

SSI e2e tests (bd_3plop_5_ssi_serialization_correctness.rs, +132 lines):
- Add multi-transaction anomaly scenarios covering write skew and
  phantom read detection under concurrent SSI transactions
- Verify that the SsiValidator correctly identifies and rejects
  dangerous rw-antidependency cycles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -16,15 +16,22 @@ on:
       - "crates/fsqlite-planner/**"
       - "crates/fsqlite-harness/src/backlog_quality_gate.rs"
       - "crates/fsqlite-harness/src/bin/backlog_quality_gate_runner.rs"
+      - "crates/fsqlite-harness/src/bin/differential_manifest_runner.rs"
+      - "crates/fsqlite-harness/src/bin/durability_matrix_manifest.rs"
       - "crates/fsqlite-harness/src/bin/perf_baseline_pack_runner.rs"
       - "crates/fsqlite-harness/src/bin/validation_manifest_runner.rs"
+      - "crates/fsqlite-harness/src/durability_matrix.rs"
+      - "crates/fsqlite-harness/src/differential_runner.rs"
       - "crates/fsqlite-harness/src/perf_loop.rs"
       - "crates/fsqlite-harness/src/performance_regression_detector.rs"
       - "crates/fsqlite-harness/src/validation_manifest.rs"
+      - "crates/fsqlite-harness/tests/bd_mblr_7_4_durability_matrix.rs"
       - "crates/fsqlite-mvcc/**"
       - "crates/fsqlite-vdbe/**"
       - "scripts/verify_backlog_quality_gate.sh"
       - "scripts/verify_ci_artifact_gates.sh"
+      - "scripts/verify_differential_ci_lane.sh"
+      - "scripts/verify_durability_matrix.sh"
       - "scripts/verify_perf_baseline_pack.sh"
       - "scripts/verify_validation_manifest.sh"
       - "scripts/bd_1as_4_index_selection_e2e.sh"
@@ -62,6 +69,188 @@ jobs:
           path: artifacts/backlog-quality-gate-e2e/
           retention-days: 21
 
+  differential-ci-smoke:
+    if: github.event_name != 'schedule'
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 45
+    env:
+      RUST_BACKTRACE: "1"
+      CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Rust toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@v1
+        with:
+          toolchain: nightly
+
+      - name: Run deterministic differential smoke lane (warning mode)
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          mkdir -p artifacts/differential-ci/smoke
+          bash ./scripts/verify_differential_ci_lane.sh --lane smoke --json \
+            > artifacts/differential-ci/smoke/report.json
+
+      - name: Publish differential smoke summary
+        if: always()
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          report_path="artifacts/differential-ci/smoke/report.json"
+          if [[ -f "${report_path}" ]]; then
+            echo "### Differential CI Lane (smoke, warning mode)" >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
+            jq -r '
+              "- lane_outcome: \(.lane.outcome)",
+              "- deterministic_match: \(.run.deterministic_match)",
+              "- run_id: `\(.run.run_id)`",
+              "- trace_id: `\(.run.trace_id)`",
+              "- seed: \(.run.root_seed)",
+              "- total_cases: \(.results.total_cases)",
+              "- diverged_cases: \(.results.diverged_cases)",
+              "- mismatch_class_counts: `\(.results.mismatch_class_counts)`",
+              "- manifest_a: `\(.artifacts.manifest_a)`",
+              "- runner_log_a: `\(.artifacts.runner_log_a)`",
+              "- replay_command: `\(.replay_command)`"
+            ' "${report_path}" >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
+          else
+            echo "Differential smoke report missing at ${report_path}" >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
+          fi
+
+      - name: Upload differential smoke artifacts
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: differential-ci-smoke-artifacts
+          path: artifacts/differential-ci/smoke/
+          retention-days: 21
+
+  differential-ci-expanded:
+    if: github.event_name == 'schedule'
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 90
+    env:
+      RUST_BACKTRACE: "1"
+      CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Rust toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@v1
+        with:
+          toolchain: nightly
+
+      - name: Run deterministic differential expanded lane (warning mode)
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          mkdir -p artifacts/differential-ci/expanded
+          bash ./scripts/verify_differential_ci_lane.sh --lane expanded --json \
+            > artifacts/differential-ci/expanded/report.json
+
+      - name: Publish differential expanded summary
+        if: always()
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          report_path="artifacts/differential-ci/expanded/report.json"
+          if [[ -f "${report_path}" ]]; then
+            echo "### Differential CI Lane (expanded, warning mode)" >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
+            jq -r '
+              "- lane_outcome: \(.lane.outcome)",
+              "- deterministic_match: \(.run.deterministic_match)",
+              "- run_id: `\(.run.run_id)`",
+              "- trace_id: `\(.run.trace_id)`",
+              "- seed: \(.run.root_seed)",
+              "- total_cases: \(.results.total_cases)",
+              "- diverged_cases: \(.results.diverged_cases)",
+              "- mismatch_class_counts: `\(.results.mismatch_class_counts)`",
+              "- manifest_a: `\(.artifacts.manifest_a)`",
+              "- runner_log_a: `\(.artifacts.runner_log_a)`",
+              "- replay_command: `\(.replay_command)`"
+            ' "${report_path}" >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
+          else
+            echo "Differential expanded report missing at ${report_path}" >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
+          fi
+
+      - name: Upload differential expanded artifacts
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: differential-ci-expanded-artifacts
+          path: artifacts/differential-ci/expanded/
+          retention-days: 21
+
+  durability-matrix-gate:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 60
+    env:
+      RUST_BACKTRACE: "1"
+      CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Rust toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@v1
+        with:
+          toolchain: nightly
+
+      - name: Run deterministic durability matrix gate
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          mkdir -p artifacts/durability-matrix
+          bash ./scripts/verify_durability_matrix.sh --json > artifacts/durability-matrix/report.json
+
+      - name: Publish durability matrix summary
+        if: always()
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          report_path="artifacts/durability-matrix/report.json"
+          if [[ -f "${report_path}" ]]; then
+            echo "### Durability Matrix Gate" >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
+            jq -r '
+              "- lane_outcome: \(.lane.outcome)",
+              "- highest_severity: \(.lane.highest_severity)",
+              "- violation_count: \(.lane.violation_count)",
+              "- block_release: \(.release_gate.block_release)",
+              "- blocking_threshold: \(.release_gate.blocking_threshold)",
+              "- run_id: `\(.run.run_id)`",
+              "- trace_id: `\(.run.trace_id)`",
+              "- root_seed: \(.run.root_seed)",
+              "- environment_count: \(.matrix.environment_count)",
+              "- scenario_count: \(.matrix.scenario_count)",
+              "- probe_count: \(.matrix.probe_count)",
+              "- dry_run_total: \(.dry_run.total_probes)",
+              "- checks.matrix_determinism.pass: \(.checks.matrix_determinism.pass)",
+              "- checks.workflow_determinism.pass: \(.checks.workflow_determinism.pass)",
+              "- checks.matrix_contract.pass: \(.checks.matrix_contract.pass)",
+              "- checks.dry_run_contract.pass: \(.checks.dry_run_contract.pass)",
+              "- checks.matrix_dry_run_counts.pass: \(.checks.matrix_dry_run_counts.pass)",
+              "- report: `\($report_path)`",
+              "- replay_matrix_command: `\(.replay.matrix_command)`",
+              "- replay_dry_run_command: `\(.replay.dry_run_command)`"
+            ' --arg report_path "${report_path}" "${report_path}" >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
+            if jq -e '.drift.violations | length > 0' "${report_path}" >/dev/null; then
+              echo "- drift_violations:" >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
+              jq -r '.drift.violations[] | "  - [\(.severity)] \(.phase): \(.detail)"' "${report_path}" >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
+            fi
+          else
+            echo "Durability matrix report missing at ${report_path}" >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
+          fi
+
+      - name: Upload durability matrix artifacts
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: durability-matrix-artifacts
+          path: artifacts/durability-matrix/
+          retention-days: 21
+
   param-binding-regression-guard:
     if: github.event_name != 'schedule'
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest

@@ -5,6 +5,10 @@
 # 1. Synthetic backlog with known baseline issue produces deterministic pass output.
 # 2. Introducing a new critical-path acceptance gap causes regression failure.
 # 3. Optional repository-mode run validates current .beads backlog against baseline.
+#
+# Env overrides:
+# - BACKLOG_QUALITY_GATE_RUNNER_BIN=target/debug/backlog_quality_gate_runner
+# - BACKLOG_QUALITY_GATE_USE_RCH=1
 
 set -euo pipefail
 
@@ -32,7 +36,14 @@ done
 
 mkdir -p "$RUN_ROOT"
 
-if command -v rch >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+RUNNER_BIN="${BACKLOG_QUALITY_GATE_RUNNER_BIN:-}"
+if [[ -n "${RUNNER_BIN}" ]]; then
+  if [[ ! -x "${RUNNER_BIN}" ]]; then
+    echo "ERROR: BACKLOG_QUALITY_GATE_RUNNER_BIN is not executable: ${RUNNER_BIN}" >&2
+    exit 2
+  fi
+  RUNNER=("${RUNNER_BIN}")
+elif [[ "${BACKLOG_QUALITY_GATE_USE_RCH:-1}" == "1" ]] && command -v rch >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   RUNNER=(rch exec -- cargo run -p fsqlite-harness --bin backlog_quality_gate_runner --)
 else
   RUNNER=(cargo run -p fsqlite-harness --bin backlog_quality_gate_runner --)
@@ -68,7 +79,10 @@ cat > "$FIXTURE_BASELINE" <<'EOF'
   "entries": [
     {
       "issue_id": "bd-fixture-known",
-      "missing_requirements": ["deterministic_e2e"]
+      "missing_requirements": [
+        "deterministic_e2e",
+        "structured_logging"
+      ]
     }
   ]
 }
@@ -80,15 +94,17 @@ EOF
   --output-json "$REPORT_A" \
   --output-human "$SUMMARY_A" \
   --critical-priority-max 1 \
-  --generated-unix-ms "$FIXED_TS"
+  --generated-unix-ms "$FIXED_TS" \
+  1>&2
 
 "${RUNNER[@]}" \
   --beads "$FIXTURE_BEADS_PASS" \
   --baseline "$FIXTURE_BASELINE" \
   --output-json "$REPORT_B" \
   --output-human "$SUMMARY_B" \
   --critical-priority-max 1 \
-  --generated-unix-ms "$FIXED_TS"
+  --generated-unix-ms "$FIXED_TS" \
+  1>&2
 
 if ! diff -u "$REPORT_A" "$REPORT_B" >/dev/null; then
   echo "ERROR: deterministic replay failed for pass fixture reports" >&2
@@ -103,7 +119,8 @@ set +e
   --output-json "$REPORT_FAIL" \
   --output-human "$SUMMARY_FAIL" \
   --critical-priority-max 1 \
-  --generated-unix-ms "$FIXED_TS"
+  --generated-unix-ms "$FIXED_TS" \
+  1>&2
 FAIL_EXIT=$?
 set -e
 
@@ -128,7 +145,8 @@ if $REPO_GATE; then
     --baseline "$WORKSPACE_ROOT/conformance/backlog_quality_gate_baseline.json" \
     --output-json "$REPO_REPORT" \
     --output-human "$REPO_SUMMARY" \
-    --critical-priority-max 1
+    --critical-priority-max 1 \
+    1>&2
   REPO_STATUS=$?
   set -e
 fi
